issue.message: Don't include `android.R` here; use a fully qualified name for each usage instead
This block comment looks like it was intended to be a javadoc comment
issue.errorLine1: * A utility class for {@link InputMethodManager}. Unlike {@link RichInputMethodManager}, this

issue.message: Array `touch_position_correction_data_holo` has an inconsistent number of items (9 in `values/touch-position-correction.xml`, 0 in `values-sw600dp/touch-position-correction.xml`)
By convention, the custom view (`EmojiPageKeyboardView`) and the declare-styleable (`MainKeyboardView`) should have the same name (various editor features rely on this convention)
By convention, the custom view (`EmojiPalettesView`) and the declare-styleable (`Keyboard`) should have the same name (various editor features rely on this convention)
By convention, the custom view (`KeyboardView`) and the declare-styleable (`Keyboard_Key`) should have the same name (various editor features rely on this convention)

Duplicate id @+id/bottom_row_keyboard, defined or included multiple times in layout/main_keyboard_frame.xml: [layout/main_keyboard_frame.xml => layout/emoji_palettes_view.xml defines @+id/bottom_row_keyboard, layout/main_keyboard_frame.xml => layout/clipboard_history_view.xml defines @+id/bottom_row_keyboard]

location.message: Duplicate id @+id/bottom_row_keyboard, defined or included multiple times in layout/main_keyboard_frame.xml: [layout/main_keyboard_frame.xml => layout/emoji_palettes_view.xml defines @+id/bottom_row_keyboard, layout/main_keyboard_frame.xml => layout/clipboard_history_view.xml defines @+id/bottom_row_keyboard]
Defined here, included via layout/main_keyboard_frame.xml => layout/emoji_palettes_view.xml defines @+id/bottom_row_keyboard
Defined here, included via layout/main_keyboard_frame.xml => layout/clipboard_history_view.xml defines @+id/bottom_row_keyboard

issue.message: Field requires API level 34 (current min is 21): `android.view.HapticFeedbackConstants#NO_HAPTICS`
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
The lambda argument (`{ it <= ' ' }`) is unnecessary
Attribute `enableOnBackInvokedCallback` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 28)
Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 28)
Attribute `fillType` is only used in API level 24 and higher (current min is 21)
Attribute `width` is only used in API level 23 and higher (current min is 21)

Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration

A newer version of `compileSdkVersion` than 35 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.16.0 is available: 1.18.0
A newer version of androidx.security:security-crypto than 1.0.0 is available: 1.1.0
issue.errorLine1: implementation("androidx.security:security-crypto:1.0.0") // encrypted prefs for the API key

"spoken_use_headphones" is not translated in "ast" (Asturian; Bable; Leonese; Asturleonese), "fil" (Filipino; Pilipino), "bal" (Baluchi), "dv" (Divehi; Dhivehi; Maldivian), "ota" (Turkish, Ottoman (1500-1928)), "as" (Assamese), "kab" (Kabyle), "sc" (Sardinian), "gd" (Scottish Gaelic), "or" (Odia), "kw" (Cornish), "jpr" (Judeo-Persian), "tg" (Tajik), "cy" (Welsh), "lb" (Luxembourgish)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="spoken_use_headphones">Plug in a headset to hear password keys spoken aloud.</string>

"Pagina" is a common misspelling; did you mean "Página"?
"yada" is a common misspelling; did you mean "ya da"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="backup_restore_message">Kaydet yada dosyadan yükle. Uyarı: geri yükleme mevcut verilerin üzerine yazacaktır</string>

issue.message: Repeated word "dados" in message: possible typo
issue.errorLine1: <string name="gesture_data_reminder_message">Olá boas!\n­·Usou a recolha de dados dados de gestos anteriormente, mas não adicionou dados desde então. Quer contribuir novamente?</string>

issue.message: The resource string "cut" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "eu" (Basque) here
The resource string "popup_keys_language" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "nb" (Norwegian Bokmål) here
The resource string "cut" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "uk" (Ukrainian) here
The resource string "cut" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "bn" (Bangla) here
The resource string "cut" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "pt" (Portuguese) here
The resource string "cut" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "ar" (Arabic) here
The resource string "label_language_switch_key" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "zh" (Chinese) here
Formatting %d followed by words ("seconds"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
The language `in (Indonesian)` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource
The language `iw (Hebrew)` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource
Dynamically loading code using `load` is risky, please use `loadLibrary` instead when possible

The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and higher and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures cloud backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `AccessibilityUtils` which has field `mContext` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `RichInputMethodManager` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This `<FrameLayout>` can be replaced with a `<merge>` tag
The resource `R.integer.config_double_space_period_timeout` appears to be unused
The resource `R.integer.config_gesture_fast_typing_cooldown_step` appears to be unused
The resource `R.dimen.config_accessibility_edge_slop` appears to be unused
The resource `R.integer.config_user_dictionary_max_word_length` appears to be unused
The resource `R.bool.config_default_key_preview_popup` appears to be unused
The resource `R.dimen.settings_screen_icon_inset` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.ic_sort_alphabetically` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.ic_sort_chronologically` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.keyboard_key_feedback_more_background_lxx_light` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.spoken_current_text_is` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.spoken_no_text_entered` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.spoken_description_upper_case` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.auto_correction_threshold_mode_off` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="auto_correction_threshold_mode_off">Off</string> <!-- todo: use it or remove it -->

issue.message: The resource `R.string.layout_functional_keys_khipro` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.user_dict_settings_more_languages` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="user_dict_settings_more_languages">More languages…</string> <!-- todo: use it or remove it -->

issue.message: The resource `R.string.gesture_data_delete_data` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.gesture_data_review_screen_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.gesture_data_words_selected` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.gesture_data_date_range` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.gesture_data_delete_dialog_confirm` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="gesture_data_delete_dialog_confirm">Are you sure? This will delete %s words. Make sure your shared date is submitted!</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.voice_input_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.voice_prompt_preset_custom` appears to be unused
